infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Love Desire uses the camera so you can capture daily Moments, send Tease photos and videos, and add photos to Time Capsules.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Love Desire uses the microphone so you can record voice notes in Tease and audio answers in Truth or Dare.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Love Desire needs access to your photo library so you can pick photos for your profile, Moments, Tease, and Time Capsules.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Love Desire can save photos to your library when you choose to export a Moment or Time Capsule.

plugins.photosPermission: Love Desire needs access to your photo library so you can pick photos for your profile, Moments, Tease, and Time Capsules.
plugins.cameraPermission: Love Desire uses the camera so you can capture daily Moments, send Tease photos and videos, and add photos to Time Capsules.
plugins.microphonePermission: Love Desire uses the microphone so you can record voice notes in Tease and audio answers in Truth or Dare.

plugins.cameraPermission: Love Desire uses the camera so you can scan your partner's invite QR code to pair instantly.
